query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `studyTopics` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `topic` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `context` text,
  `handSlug` varchar(16),
  `isReviewed` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `studyTopics` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `topic` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `context` text,
  `handSlug` varchar(16),
  `isReviewed` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);
